# LivePort

> Secure localhost tunnels for AI agents — expose local servers to the internet with bridge key authentication

Base URL: https://liveport.dev
Tunnel domain: https://<subdomain>.liveport.online

## Quick Start

```bash
# Install CLI
npm install -g @liveport/cli

# Get a bridge key from https://liveport.dev

# Expose local port 3000
liveport connect 3000 --key lpk_yourkey

# Or use env var
export LIVEPORT_KEY=lpk_yourkey
liveport connect 3000
```

```typescript
// Agent SDK
import { LivePortAgent } from "@liveport/agent-sdk";

const agent = new LivePortAgent({ key: process.env.LIVEPORT_BRIDGE_KEY! });
const tunnel = await agent.connect(3000);
await agent.waitForReady(tunnel);
console.log(tunnel.url); // https://abc123.liveport.online
await agent.disconnect();
```

## Authentication

All requests use bridge keys. Format: `lpk_<32 random chars>` (36 chars total).
Display prefix: first 12 chars (e.g. `lpk_xxxxxxxx`).

HTTP header: `Authorization: Bearer <bridge-key>`
WebSocket headers: `X-Bridge-Key: <bridge-key>`, `X-Local-Port: <port>`

Obtain bridge keys at: https://liveport.dev/keys

## CLI

Binary: `liveport`

```
liveport connect <port> [-k <key>] [-s <url>] [-r <region>]
liveport status
liveport disconnect [-a]
liveport config set <key> <value>
liveport config get <key>
liveport config list
liveport config delete <key>
```

Config keys: `key`, `server`
Config stored at: `~/.liveport/config.json`
Auth priority: `--key` flag → `LIVEPORT_KEY` env var → config file

## Agent SDK

Package: `@liveport/agent-sdk`

### Constructor
```typescript
new LivePortAgent({
  key: string,           // required: bridge key
  apiUrl?: string,       // default: https://liveport.dev
  tunnelUrl?: string,    // default: https://tunnel.liveport.online
  timeout?: number,      // default: 30000 ms
})
```

### Methods
```typescript
agent.connect(port, options?)        // Create WebSocket tunnel → AgentTunnel
agent.waitForReady(tunnel, options?) // Poll until public URL returns 2xx → void
agent.waitForTunnel(options?)        // Long-poll API until tunnel ready → AgentTunnel
agent.listTunnels()                  // List active tunnels → AgentTunnel[]
agent.disconnect()                   // Cancel pending calls, close WS → void
```

### AgentTunnel
```typescript
interface AgentTunnel {
  tunnelId: string;    // Unique tunnel identifier
  subdomain: string;   // Assigned subdomain (e.g. "abc123")
  url: string;         // https://<subdomain>.liveport.online
  localPort: number;
  createdAt: Date;
  expiresAt: Date;
}
```

### ConnectOptions
```typescript
{ serverUrl?: string, timeout?: number }
```

### WaitForReadyOptions
```typescript
{ timeout?: number, pollInterval?: number, healthPath?: string }
```
Note: any non-2xx response (including 3xx) continues polling. Use `healthPath` to point to an endpoint that returns 2xx when ready.

### WaitForTunnelOptions
```typescript
{ timeout?: number, pollInterval?: number }
```

## WebSocket Protocol

Endpoint: `wss://tunnel.liveport.online/connect`
Headers: `X-Bridge-Key: <key>`, `X-Local-Port: <port>`

### Server → Client messages
```json
{ "type": "connected", "payload": { "tunnelId", "subdomain", "url", "expiresAt" } }
{ "type": "http_request", "id": "<reqId>", "payload": { "method", "path", "headers", "body" } }
{ "type": "heartbeat" }
{ "type": "error", "payload": { "fatal": true|false, "message": "..." } }
```

### Client → Server messages
```json
{ "type": "http_response", "id": "<reqId>", "payload": { "status", "headers", "body" } }
{ "type": "heartbeat_ack", "timestamp": "<iso>" }
{ "type": "disconnect" }
```

## HTTP API (Tunnel Server)

```
GET  /health                          Server health check (connections, uptime, metering)
GET  /api/tunnels/by-key/:keyId       List tunnels by key ID (X-Api-Secret required)
POST /api/proxy/token                 Mint proxy token (X-Api-Secret required)
GET  /api/tls-check?domain=           On-demand TLS cert validation
ALL  *                                Catch-all: proxy to tunnel by subdomain
```

## Error Types

| Class | Description | Extra Fields |
|-------|-------------|--------------|
| `TunnelTimeoutError` | Tunnel not reachable within timeout | — |
| `ApiError` | API request failed | `.statusCode`, `.code` |
| `ConnectionError` | WebSocket connection failed | — |

## Shared Data Types

```typescript
type BridgeKey = {
  id: UUID; userId: UUID; name: string;
  keyHash: string; keyPrefix: string;
  expiresAt?: Date; maxUses?: number; currentUses: number;
  allowedPort?: number;
  status: "active" | "revoked" | "expired";
  lastUsedAt?: Date; createdAt: Date; updatedAt: Date;
}

type Tunnel = {
  id: UUID; userId: UUID; bridgeKeyId?: UUID;
  subdomain: string; name?: string; localPort: number;
  publicUrl: string; region: string;
  connectedAt: Date; disconnectedAt?: Date;
  requestCount: number; bytesTransferred: number;
}

type User = {
  id: UUID; email: string; name?: string;
  tier: "free" | "pro" | "team" | "enterprise";
  createdAt: Date; updatedAt: Date;
}
```

## Limits

- Free tier: 1 concurrent tunnel per bridge key
- Paid tiers: Up to 5 concurrent tunnels per key
- Max request body: 10MB
- Max WebSocket frame: 10MB
- Request timeout: 30s
- Heartbeat: 10s interval, 30s timeout
- Auto-reconnect (CLI): 5 attempts with exponential backoff

## Environment Variables (Tunnel Server)

| Variable | Required | Default | Description |
|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| PORT | No | 8080 | Server port |
| BASE_DOMAIN | No | liveport.online | Base domain for tunnels |
| MECH_APPS_APP_ID | Yes | — | mech-storage app ID |
| MECH_APPS_API_KEY | Yes | — | mech-storage API key |
| MECH_APPS_URL | No | https://storage.mechdna.net | mech-storage URL (no /api suffix) |
| REDIS_URL | No | — | Redis URL for rate limiting |
| INTERNAL_API_SECRET | No | — | Secret for internal API endpoints |
| PROXY_GATEWAY_ENABLED | No | false | Enable HTTPS CONNECT proxy |
| PROXY_TOKEN_SECRET | Cond. | — | Secret for proxy token signing |
| PROXY_ALLOWED_HOSTS | Cond. | — | Allowed proxy hosts (required if proxy enabled) |
| PROXY_ALLOWED_DOMAINS | Cond. | — | Allowed proxy domain suffixes |
| METERING_SYNC_INTERVAL_MS | No | 30000 | Metrics sync interval |
| METERING_ENABLED | No | true | Enable metering |

## Environment Variables (Dashboard)

| Variable | Required | Description |
|----------|----------|-------------|
| MECH_APPS_APP_ID | Yes | mech-storage app ID |
| MECH_APPS_API_KEY | Yes | mech-storage API key |
| MECH_APPS_URL | No | mech-storage URL (no /api suffix) |
| REDIS_URL | Yes | Redis connection string |
| CLEARAUTH_SECRET | Yes | ClearAuth secret (32+ chars) |
| AUTH_SECRET | Yes | Auth secret (32+ chars) |
| NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY | No | PostHog analytics key |
| NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_HOST | No | PostHog host |
